name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, mix the parmesan cheese and lemon pepper.
2. Dip each chicken breast half in the beaten egg white.
3. Coat the chicken in the cheese and lemon mixture.
4. Heat oven to 400°F (200°C).
5. Place the chicken on a rack and grill for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
6. Alternatively, preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C) and bake the chicken uncovered for 11-17 minutes in a baking dish.
